inline_comments.message: Boy that is picky.  How many times have I been dinged for NOT initializing a local variable.
Yeah, I agree your correct solution to my error is more complicated than the original. I will restore this part to the original.

In general, "unit-testing" should not be reflected back in real source code.   No action required on this since this is existing code, but keep on the back of your mind to see if it can be resolved, so not intertwine real code with testing code
